product_surfaces: internal/gitcode HTTPClient REST calls for list/get/create issue, issue comments, and wiki pages
internal/service Service SyncToCache and CreateIssue live write paths
internal/cache SQLiteStore independent cache databases, record digests, and comment counts
internal/gitcode redaction of emitted e2e log/error messages
evidence_type: offline API test using stubbed external GitCode HTTP provider plus e2e skip-path runtime check
freshness: current working tree; deterministic offline execution; live network disabled; no real GitCode credentials, OS keychain, or device required

mocks_used.name: local httptest GitCode-compatible API server
mocks_used.purpose: serve deterministic issue, comment, wiki, and create-issue responses while exercising production HTTP client, service, and SQLite cache paths through the e2e test binary
